# /clarify

> Resolve Open Items and `<TBD>` markers; flip `gates.PLAN_CLARIFIED` to APPROVED.

## Usage

```
/clarify [--approve] [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/plan.md`
- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/spec.md`
- [templates/checklists/plan-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/plan-review.checklist.md)

## Execution flow

1. Run `doc_lint` on plan.md.
2. Evaluate each checklist category:
   - L1-L4 completeness (every L3 has L4 placeholders; L4 in 3-8h window)
   - Pattern category coverage (every L4 belongs to a declared L2 pattern category)
   - NFR target per resource
   - Cross-agent handoffs in `_handoffs/`
   - IaC module names + tags per [constitution/11-iac-and-deployment.md](../../constitution/11-iac-and-deployment.md)
3. Write `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/reviews/plan-review.md`.
4. On `--approve`: flip `gates.PLAN_CLARIFIED.status=APPROVED`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/reviews/plan-review.md`
- `.workflow.json` updated

## See also

- [ADR-0001](../../../design/adr/0001-review-scope-spec-only.md)
- [templates/checklists/plan-review.checklist.md](../../templates/checklists/plan-review.checklist.md)
